_comment: ms-365-mcp-server (Softeria), stdio over Microsoft Graph. Read-only is the --read-only flag (disables all write operations). --org-mode enables work-account services (Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive). Authenticate via device-code login on first use (see SETUP.md); no secrets in committed config. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
